title: ECHOES: Equal-weight Completed Hypothetical Observation Ensembles for BOSS DR12 CMASS-South
description: ECHOES turns a spectroscopic galaxy survey into an ensemble of equal-weight, cosmology-free completed catalogs: observed galaxies are kept and the spectroscopically-missing galaxies are restored at their real imaging positions with data-driven redshifts, so any clustering statistic can be run directly on completed point catalogs. This is the software package and reproducible pipeline for the first release (BOSS DR12 CMASS-South).

creators.name: Abel, Tom
creators.affiliation: Kavli Institute for Particle Astrophysics and Cosmology, Stanford University
